pages.text:
PeopleFlow HR Systems Ltd.

Investor Snapshot \| Vertical SaaS – Human Capital Management

Quarter Ended: Q2 2025 \| Reporting Currency: GBP

PeopleFlow HR Systems Ltd. ("PeopleFlow") provides human capital management tools to professional services firms in the UK
and Ireland.

Key Metrics – Q2 2025

| Metric(GBP unless noted) | Q2 2025 |
| --- | --- |
| Quarterly Revenue | 5.1M |
| Subscription ARR (end of period) | 21.4M |
| Net Dollar Retention(LTM) | 118% |
| Annual Logo Churn | 4.2% |
| Paying Customer Logos | 412 |
| Avg.Seats per Customer | 146 |
| Module Attach Rate | 2.3 modules/acct |
| Total Headcount | 96 |

Commentary

In the quarter ended 30 June 2025, PeopleFlow delivered Quarterly Revenue of 5.1M, up from 4.6M in Q1 2025 (as restated; refer
to footnote 2). End-of-period Subscription ARR reached 21.4M versus 19.8M in the prior quarter. Gross Margin was 73% in Q2
2025, slightly below the 74% recorded in Q1 2025, as the company continued migrating workloads to a new cloud provider.
Headcount additions were concentrated in customer success and product. Average seats per customer increased to 146 as the
company continued to drive module attach in performance and analytics.

Non-Core Financial Items

• FX translation gain on EUR-denominated contracts: +0.09M

• One-time restructuring charge (office consolidation): (0.21M)

(1) All figures in GBP unless otherwise stated.

(2) Q1 2025 Quarterly Revenue has been restated from 4.7M to 4.6M to reflect the reversal of a contract modification initially recognised in Q1 but
subsequently unwound in April 2025 following a customer renegotiation. The Q1 2025 standalone investor report has not been reissued.

(3) Gross Margin of 73% is discussed in commentary; not separately tabled this period.

• Share-based compensation expense: 0.38M

(4) Net Dollar Retention is computed in GBP; label maintained for cross-portfolio comparability.

(5) Module Attach Rate introduced Q2 2025: avg. distinct platform modules per active account.
